scripts.dev:full: run-s init-template move-template && run-p server client electron
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run copy-react && cd electron-app && npm run release
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run copy-react && cd electron-app && npm run release
scripts.release:publish: npm run build && npm run copy-react && cd electron-app && npm run release:publish
scripts.package:publish: npm run build && npm run copy-react && cd electron-app && npm run release:publish
scripts.package:no-publish: npm run build && npm run copy-react && cd electron-app && npm run release:no-publish
